retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operation is embedded in broader allocation logic; failure due to ENOMEM could be retried but the refcount operation itself never fails.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is allocation and initialization of a URB (including copying headers, allocating transfer buffers, setting direction). The refcount operation (usb_alloc_urb) is just one step in the allocation process; the function contains significant non-refcount logic.
